mapper.sql: id, chapter_id, video_name, video_url, file_size, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_chapter_video WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO edu_chapter_video (chapter_id, video_name, video_url, file_size, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by) VALUES
(#{item.chapterId}, #{item.videoName}, #{item.videoUrl}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.sort}, NOW(), NOW(), #{item.createBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_chapter_video SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND deleted = 0
